programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: In Birmingham, a former Birmingham City footballer sings for her grandad, while a Royal Navy officer performs Nessun Dorma, bringing the Bull Ring to a standstill. A primary school teacher unleashes her inner rock star, a pregnant woman sings the song that saved her, and an Iranian refugee for whom singing was once an act of rebellion takes to the stage

programme.title: Sarah Beenys New Country Lives
programme.desc: Pete and Carina want to create a caravan site, but who will use it? James finds out about holiday home rental rates, and Ioan builds on his newfound independence

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A mysterious cat burglar ransacks the Simpson household, making off with Lisas saxophone. Homer becomes the leader of a neighbourhood watch scheme to find the miscreant - but soon lets the power go to his head. Featuring the guest voice of Sam Neill

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes offence at a new doll that supposedly demeans women, and persuades its inventor to design a more up-to-date version, hoping to provide young girls with a positive role model. Featuring the guest voice of Kathleen Turner

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Barts antics with family dog Santas Little Helper cause mayhem, and ultimately result in Principal Skinner getting the sack and eternal do-gooder Ned Flanders being appointed in his place

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug asks Arthur to coach him at table tennis in a bid to beat Carrie and boost his deflated ego, while Spence is put out to learn his girlfiend has been promoted to waitress at the bowling alley. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie decide to renew their wedding vows, but preparations for the ceremony throw up more challenges than anticipated - not least the task of finding a chimp to act as best man

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Deacons estranged wife tells Carrie she wants to get back with him. Doug isnt sure whether to reveal this new development to his friend - especially as hes just announced hes going away for the weekend with another woman

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray buys Debra an expensive Christmas present in the hope she will be grateful enough to let him go on a weekend golf trip with friends, but has not anticipated that she is getting him an even more extravagant gift. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray becomes the butt of embarrassing jibes for failing to consider Debras feelings in a social crisis, and vows to be more attentive in future. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray gets the chance to cover the Super Bowl for his newspaper - but feels guilty about not asking Debra to accompany him. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink bumps into a former friend of Martins while visiting Maris in hospital. The pair parted on bad terms, so Frasier tries to effect a reconciliation. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A plumber hired to repair Frasiers toilet turns out to be the bully who made Niles life a misery at school. Comedy, guest starring John C McGinley, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz falls out with Frasier and accepts an offer from Bulldog to produce his show instead. Comedy, starring Peri Gilpin, Dan Butler and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Alex Iwobi, Kevin Olusola, Alex Fletcher and Nick Pickard. With a live performance from Australian singer-songwriter Ruel

programme.title: Womens FA Cup
programme.sub-title: Liverpool v Brighton and Hove Albion
programme.desc: Liverpool v Brighton and Hove Albion (Kick-off 12.15pm). Jill Scott and Maisie Adam present live coverage of the semi-final at BrewDog Stadium in St Helens. Liverpool were made to work hard for a 1-0 win over Charlton Athletic after extra time in the previous round, while Brighton claimed a shock 2-0 win away to Arsenal, and both teams are now looking to reach the showpiece match for the first time in their history

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet two couples taking advantage of a first-time buyer scheme to help them onto the property ladder in Essex, only to find their budgets wont take them very far. Kirstie is with locals Sarah and Charlie who need a home to bring them together after five years of living with their respective parents. Theyve started to lose their nerve after eight months of unsuccessful house-hunting and it quickly becomes clear that their best chance of success is to take on a project. Phils couple Toby and Simone have high expectations of what their home should be after renting in London, but their budget doesnt match up to the house, or postcode, theyre accustomed to

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: An actress moves up the four-wheel property ladder, from a one-bed tiny transit to a two-bedroom luxury Luton Van conversion. A train carriage gets a makeover into a dog-friendly holiday let and George visits an amazing underground bar as well as a house in Denmark that is completely covered in seashells. The saga of the scissor-lift cabin continues, as George and Will Hardie get to grips with some serious weight issues

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still (2008)
programme.desc: An alien arrives on Earth, accompanied by an awesomely powerful robot, on a fateful mission - to decide if the human race deserves to continue - and if not, to wipe it out. The visitor is imprisoned in a military facility, but a scientist helps him escape, hoping to prove that mankind is worth saving. Sci-fi drama remake, starring Keanu Reeves and Jennifer Connelly

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Rebecca Lucy Taylor, Tommy Tiernan, Meera Syal and Adam Buxton put their skills to the test to impress judges Caroline Waldegrave and Paul Hollywood, and raise money for charity. The bakers take on crumpets in the signature and try not to panic over perfect piping in the technical, before recreating their own celebrity hero in pastry for the showstopper

programme.title: Cruising to the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: The Royal Princess drops anchor in Alaskas state capital Juneau, where a family from Preston travel off the beaten track to Auke Bay, a wildlife haven where bald eagles soar above snow-capped peaks and the ocean stirs with the presence of giants. Half a world away in the sun-drenched Mediterranean, shipmates Millie and Jon discover the timeless beauty of Corfu, journeying to an ancient olive mill thats been in the same family for six generations

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Sam Ryder and Paloma Faith take the chosen singers into the studio to rehearse for the final concert. But first, they decide to include a fifth singer. Who should they bring back? As the practice sessions begin, Milo must learn to be bigger on stage, Chantel battles with self-doubt, Findlay rehearses his mums funeral song a year after her death and Mina starts losing her voice the day before the concert. Alison Hammond follows their progress

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Jamies Ultimate BBQ, Britains Got Talent, Widows Bay, Married at First Sight Australia, Great Korean Railway Journeys, Apex and the BBC News report on the flatpack championships

programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: Professor Vin Paleri attempts to reconstruct a throat cancer patients entire windpipe - but one mistake could leave him unable to swallow or speak. A woman who had a fibroid removed from her womb discovers it contains a rare form of cancer, and will now need to have her entire reproductive system removed. A patient has a rare cancer growing in the back of his abdomen

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: The conclusion of a two-part edition. After a much-needed reality check from Gordon, the three sisters unite to rebuild their familys legacy. What starts as a heartfelt memorial for their late father turns into a high-stakes mission to revamp Callahans Seafood Bar and Grill

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Joe Lycett and guest companion Phil Wang embark on a two-day mini-break in the US capital, Washington, DC. Their home for the weekend is the Eaton Hotel, which features a 24-hour radio station, a plant rehab centre and a crystal library. At the National Mall, the pair take in some of the planets most recognisable monuments and memorials, including the worlds biggest obelisk, aka the Washington Monument, the Reflecting Pool, the Second World War memorial and the Lincoln Memorial. Day two features a celebration of DCs diverse food scene

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge stumbles into a new job as a food-storage container-selling drag queen when ambitious hairdresser Julio gives her a makeover. Meanwhile, Lisa tries to make the world better in the style of Amelie from the French romantic comedy of the same name. With the guest voice of RuPaul

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer falls for a sexy colleague and tries to avoid her, fearing he may be unable to resist temptation. However, Mr Burns sends the two of them on a business trip together and the enforced intimacy puts an intolerable strain on his willpower. Featuring the guest voice of Michelle Pfeiffer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Psychotic Sideshow Bob is released from Springfield Penitentiary thirsting for revenge - prompting Bart and the rest of the family to join the witness protection programme. Featuring the guest voice of Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Boy Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: Mayor Quimbys nephew is wrongly accused of assault, presenting Bart with a dilemma - if he volunteers the information that would clear the lads name, he risks being expelled from school for playing truant

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners from Berkshire compete to win the £1,000 prize, including Leanne and Ricci who hope to impress their guests with a Caribbean-inspired menu. Also competing are cultured couple Eveleen and Michael, before final duo Natasha and Paul throw an evening dedicated to fine dining and quality ingredients

programme.title: Sarah Beenys New Country Lives
programme.desc: Jon and Kay plan the next phase of refurbishing an old country pub while Dannie and Grace decide to build a chicken coop for their ever-growing flock

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by actrress and comedian Nina Wadia in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane has a change of heart and rushes to Cape Cod to tell Sam - who has also had second thoughts and wants to go back to playing the field. Starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff gets excited when he sets his mother up with a wealthy man, but the scheme backfires. Guest starring Frances Sternhagen, alongside Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier is excited about appearing in a televised debate between noted psychiatrists - until he learns that one of the guests is his old flame Dr Lilith Sternin. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Bebe Neuwirth

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is horrified to learn that his mother used to read the diary he kept as a teenager, which contained his most personal thoughts. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra are shocked to realise they have virtually nothing to talk about except the kids, and resolve to take more of an interest in each others hobbies

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is disturbed to learn Michael and Geoffrey are playing fairies in the school play, especially as they chose the roles themselves. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton, Sullivan Sweeten and Sawyer Sweeten

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin tries to solve a murder case that has been preying on his mind for the past 20 years, but Frasier decides to step in with his own solution. Comedy, starring John Mahoney and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Fool Me Once, Shame on You, Fool Me Twice
programme.desc: The shrink attempts to use psychoanalysis on a self-confessed lazy criminal who has stolen his briefcase and car and is masquerading as the real Frasier Crane. Comedy, guest starring Nathan Lane, with Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Attractive and popular psychologist Dr Honey Snow dates Frasier, who is so flattered that he agrees to write the introduction to her latest book - a decision that later causes him a king-size crisis of conscience. Guest starring Shannon Tweed

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Show Where Sam Shows Up
programme.desc: Cheers owner Sam Malone turns up in Seattle to ask for advice on whether to go through with his wedding - but Frasier recognises his old friends fiancee as a woman he slept with three months previously. Comedy, guest starring Ted Danson and Tea Leoni

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole head to High Wycombe in Buckinghamshire, a town famed for furniture production - music to Simons ears, but not a motor in sight for Henry

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: British people rebuilding abandoned historic settlements in Europe. Landscape gardeners from Kent explore an abandoned settlement in Normandy which was about to collapse. A Yorkshire couple set about completing the purchase of a hilltop Italian hamlet, and a medieval walled village in France struggles for survival

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Rory Bremner in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson has her work cut out as she searches for a holiday home on Spains Orihuela Costa for married couple Karen and Paul from South Lanarkshire. Theyre looking for a holiday home which works for all three generations of their family. Can Jean find everything that theyre looking for on their £75,000 budget?

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Sidhbh and Neasa gamble on moving their plastic surgery clinic. David and Gina consider retirement after hurricanes wreck their holiday apartment business. Laura and Lindsay prepare for a new arrival in the Disney-designed small town of Celebration

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At Château La Grande Maison, Ben and Billie dream of transforming their tired orangerie into a serene health spa, while Chris and Jolyon tackle the final two of their eight bedrooms, taking on intricate wallpaper, a handmade bunk bed and a secret bookcase door

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almería, Sharon Garner and her son Shaun help financial planner Keith and his wife Tracy from Salisbury. But their property picks leave them with a dilemma. On the northern Costa Blanca, the Aldertons help returning clients who retired to Spain five years ago, and who now need to upgrade their hilltop home to something more accessible

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Jittery retriever Pipet, whos been spooked by some fireworks, arrives at Woodgreen. Will she panic when she meets Tom and Ayesha? Despite his name, Wolf the malamute is a big softie at heart, but he doesnt fall in love easily. And its a clash of the titans when nine-year-old Helena meets Zeus the Shih Tzu

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: The participants are encouraged to explore their sexual fantasies, from submission and dominance to bondage and impact play. The group begin experimenting with each other and there is also some erotic story writing. Millie, Ed and Will begin to discover new desires and confidence, while others, like Bertie, question whether this part of the programme is suited to them

programme.title: Love Cheats
programme.desc: When firefighter James messaged Coleen and asked her out on a date, she was impressed by his charming, generous nature and fun-loving sense of humour. She introduced him to her two daughters and her twin sister Karen and James soon becomes part of the family. And when he reveals that hes expecting a £2million inheritance from his relatives in France, he goes into business with Karen, while planning an extravagant wedding for Coleen. Despite James claim that hes had a vasectomy, Coleen unexpectedly falls pregnant, and doubts begin to creep in about James story. As the deceptions start to unravel, the police investigate James story, ultimately achieving some justice for the family and closure for Coleen

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A doctor shares his story of leaving his family and newborn child during lockdown to keep them safe. An 11-year-old hit by a car shows signs of possible internal bleeding, and a 60-year-old woman is injured after tripping over her cat. A footballer being treated for injuries to his achilles tendon describes how the sport has been an escape for him during his childhood in south London

programme.title: Ammo
programme.desc: Norwegian drama about the arms trade. Bjørn Urdal has been unemployed due to a corruption scandal, so when a weapons manufacturer want to hire him, he is inclined to agree. With the support of his family, Bjørn is ready to enter an industry that deals with life and death, only to slowly realise he stands to take the fall if the product is used on innocent targets. In Norwegian

programme.title: Salisbury Poisonings: The Untold Story
programme.desc: The documentary charts the immediate fallout of the attack, as staff on the hospital ICU battled to save the lives of the Skripals and local police officer Nick Bailey, who had become accidentally contaminated with Novichok. Public health officials worked round the clock with specially trained British armed forces in an attempt to stop the spread of the poison across Salisbury, while counter-terrorism officers launched a manhunt for those responsible

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis in Woodland Park, Colorado, where guests have a choice between casual fine-dining service or a pick-up from the drive-through takeaway. Hard-nosed owner Julie finds herself completely at odds with the head chef, forcing her to breaking point

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Staffordshire compete to win the £1,000 prize, beginning with Jodie and Ben who hope their risky starter of lamb tartare pays off. Dave and Sian prepare a more traditional menu on the second evening, including a bread and butter pudding, and surprise the contestants with musical entertainment. Straight-talking Michelle is the last to host with Matt, but she could have already blown their chances of winning

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: The conclusion of a two-part edition. After a much-needed reality check from Gordon, the three sisters unite to rebuild their familys legacy. What starts as a heartfelt memorial for their late father turns into a high-stakes mission to revamp Callahans Seafood Bar and Grill

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part mission, the chef gains insight on Callahans Seafood Bar and Grill, which has been sinking fast since the owner died and left the restaurant to his three daughters. The business used to be the centre of their family bond, but eldest daughter Anikas sub-standard leadership and the kitchen staffs lack of respect have left the restaurant - and the sisters relationship - in turmoil. Gordon begins by compelling the sisters and their staff to take accountability

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is horrified to learn that his mother used to read the diary he kept as a teenager, which contained his most personal thoughts. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra are shocked to realise they have virtually nothing to talk about except the kids, and resolve to take more of an interest in each others hobbies

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is disturbed to learn Michael and Geoffrey are playing fairies in the school play, especially as they chose the roles themselves. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton, Sullivan Sweeten and Sawyer Sweeten

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin tries to solve a murder case that has been preying on his mind for the past 20 years, but Frasier decides to step in with his own solution. Comedy, starring John Mahoney and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Fool Me Once, Shame on You, Fool Me Twice
programme.desc: The shrink attempts to use psychoanalysis on a self-confessed lazy criminal who has stolen his briefcase and car and is masquerading as the real Frasier Crane. Comedy, guest starring Nathan Lane, with Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Attractive and popular psychologist Dr Honey Snow dates Frasier, who is so flattered that he agrees to write the introduction to her latest book - a decision that later causes him a king-size crisis of conscience. Guest starring Shannon Tweed

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Show Where Sam Shows Up
programme.desc: Cheers owner Sam Malone turns up in Seattle to ask for advice on whether to go through with his wedding - but Frasier recognises his old friends fiancee as a woman he slept with three months previously. Comedy, guest starring Ted Danson and Tea Leoni

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole head to High Wycombe in Buckinghamshire, a town famed for furniture production - music to Simons ears, but not a motor in sight for Henry

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: British people rebuilding abandoned historic settlements in Europe. Landscape gardeners from Kent explore an abandoned settlement in Normandy which was about to collapse. A Yorkshire couple set about completing the purchase of a hilltop Italian hamlet, and a medieval walled village in France struggles for survival

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Rory Bremner in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson has her work cut out as she searches for a holiday home on Spains Orihuela Costa for married couple Karen and Paul from South Lanarkshire. Theyre looking for a holiday home which works for all three generations of their family. Can Jean find everything that theyre looking for on their £75,000 budget?

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Sidhbh and Neasa gamble on moving their plastic surgery clinic. David and Gina consider retirement after hurricanes wreck their holiday apartment business. Laura and Lindsay prepare for a new arrival in the Disney-designed small town of Celebration

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At Château La Grande Maison, Ben and Billie dream of transforming their tired orangerie into a serene health spa, while Chris and Jolyon tackle the final two of their eight bedrooms, taking on intricate wallpaper, a handmade bunk bed and a secret bookcase door

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almería, Sharon Garner and her son Shaun help financial planner Keith and his wife Tracy from Salisbury. But their property picks leave them with a dilemma. On the northern Costa Blanca, the Aldertons help returning clients who retired to Spain five years ago, and who now need to upgrade their hilltop home to something more accessible

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Jittery retriever Pipet, whos been spooked by some fireworks, arrives at Woodgreen. Will she panic when she meets Tom and Ayesha? Despite his name, Wolf the malamute is a big softie at heart, but he doesnt fall in love easily. And its a clash of the titans when nine-year-old Helena meets Zeus the Shih Tzu

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: The participants are encouraged to explore their sexual fantasies, from submission and dominance to bondage and impact play. The group begin experimenting with each other and there is also some erotic story writing. Millie, Ed and Will begin to discover new desires and confidence, while others, like Bertie, question whether this part of the programme is suited to them

programme.title: Love Cheats
programme.desc: When firefighter James messaged Coleen and asked her out on a date, she was impressed by his charming, generous nature and fun-loving sense of humour. She introduced him to her two daughters and her twin sister Karen and James soon becomes part of the family. And when he reveals that hes expecting a £2million inheritance from his relatives in France, he goes into business with Karen, while planning an extravagant wedding for Coleen. Despite James claim that hes had a vasectomy, Coleen unexpectedly falls pregnant, and doubts begin to creep in about James story. As the deceptions start to unravel, the police investigate James story, ultimately achieving some justice for the family and closure for Coleen

programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: Professor Vin Paleri attempts to reconstruct a throat cancer patients entire windpipe - but one mistake could leave him unable to swallow or speak. A woman who had a fibroid removed from her womb discovers it contains a rare form of cancer, and will now need to have her entire reproductive system removed. A patient has a rare cancer growing in the back of his abdomen

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Penny is in anaphylactic shock after a wasp sting and Warwickshire, Northamptonshire, Derbyshire, Leicestershire and Rutland air ambulance crews are on their way. The Essex and Herts air ambulance look after teenager Connor, who has broken his leg while doing tricks on his bike. Plus, motocross rider Carl needs Thames Valley air ambulances help after an accident leaves him with a dislocated hip

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis in Woodland Park, Colorado, where guests have a choice between casual fine-dining service or a pick-up from the drive-through takeaway. Hard-nosed owner Julie finds herself completely at odds with the head chef, forcing her to breaking point

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Staffordshire compete to win the £1,000 prize, beginning with Jodie and Ben who hope their risky starter of lamb tartare pays off. Dave and Sian prepare a more traditional menu on the second evening, including a bread and butter pudding, and surprise the contestants with musical entertainment. Straight-talking Michelle is the last to host with Matt, but she could have already blown their chances of winning

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.sub-title: Double Decker Retreat and Boat Hotel
programme.desc: The architect meets a carpenter who wants to turn a 30-year-old double-decker bus into a luxury holiday retreat, and a couple using their life savings to design a boat hotel. He also visits a house in Oxford made from mud and straw, and builds a camping deck out of a motorway drainage pipe for his own tree-house project

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Surrogate mum Phoebe goes into labour and gives birth to triplets, but it proves harder than she anticipated to hand them over to her brother. Meanwhile, Joey experiences some pain of his own and Monica plans to spite Chandler by dating a male nurse

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Though Joey is thrilled when his name is used in a magazine crossword puzzle, he is reluctant to let the publication do a profile of him after his last magazine interview got him fired. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Baby Shower

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Cooking Class
programme.desc: Phoebe holds a job interview coaching session for a nervous Chandler, and Ross unwittingly makes Rachel jealous by flirting with a sales assistant. Monica is stung by a restaurant reviewers comments and joins his cookery class to persuade him to reconsider his opinion

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Is Late

programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby - Part One

Phoebe courts a handsome patient, while Monica and Chandler decide there is no time like the present to start a family of their own

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby - Part Two

programme.desc: Chandler falls asleep in a meeting - with disastrous consequences. Meanwhile, Rachel desperately searches for a solution to baby Emmas non-stop crying and Ross breaks his finger trying to punch Joey

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica accepts a job as chef at arenownedManhattan restaurant, while Chandler decides to split his working week between Tulsa and New York. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes fear that she may be about to lose her latest boyfriend is compounded by Rosss foolish comments. Monica makes a startling discovery about Chandler while visiting him in Tulsa, and Joey is upset to learn his date does not remember having previously slept with him

programme.title: Dr Dolittle (1998)
programme.desc: A doctor is stunned to discover he can talk to animals, and it is not long before his home and surgery are taken over by an assortment of ailing creatures in need of help. However, when the medics odd behaviour attracts his colleagues attention, he is forced to rely on his new-found furry friends to save him from the asylum. Comedy, starring Eddie Murphy, Ossie Davis and Oliver Platt

programme.desc: Rachel tries to make amends with work rival Gavin, but realises she will never get along with him. Ross urges Joey to stay away from Emmas new nanny, while Phoebe and Mike adopt a litter of rats. Melissa George and Dermot Mulroney guest star

programme.title: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery (1997)
programme.desc: A velvet-clad, sex-crazed secret agent from the 1960s agrees to be put into a state of suspended animation after his arch-enemy escapes justice. programme.desc: Amys mother and father turn up unexpectedly, intending to take their daughter back home with them. They are less than happy to find Ray there, let alone his parents, and the atmosphere is tense as the families take an instant dislike to each other

programme.sub-title: The One with Rosss Inappropriate Song

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Other Sister
programme.desc: Rachels sister Amy joins the gang for Thanksgiving, and Monica worries about her best china getting damaged. Meanwhile, Joey forgets to turn up for the Days of Our Lives cast float. Guest starring Christina Applegate

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Phone Number
programme.desc: Chandler returns from Tulsa to visit Monica, but has to hide from Joey after rejecting his offer of free basketball tickets. Rachel goes out with Phoebe for a night on the town, while Ross and Mike find they have nothing in common

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Christmas in Tulsa
programme.desc: Chandler feels glum at having to spend Christmas in Tulsa, so a workmate stays behind to keep him company. Unfortunately, she ends up making a pass at him, prompting him to take drastic action and quit his job altogether. Guest starring Selma Blair

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Goes Back to Work
programme.desc: Rachel visits work to show off her baby and immediately clashes with the temp standing in for her, convinced he is trying to steal her job. Phoebe causes havoc on the set of Joeys TV show, while Chandler and Monica reconsider starting a family. Guest starring Dermot Mulroney

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel tries to make amends with work rival Gavin, but realises she will never get along with him. Ross urges Joey to stay away from Emmas new nanny, while Phoebe and Mike adopt a litter of rats. Melissa George and Dermot Mulroney guest star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross enlists Chandler to help him make Rachel jealous. Monica gets the chance to perform at Mikes nightclub and Joey seeks help to disguise a botched eyebrow-waxing. Guest starring Dermot Mulroney and Melissa George

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Blind Dates
programme.desc: In an effort to remind Rachel and Ross of their former happiness together, Joey and Phoebe set them up with their worst possible blind dates, while baby Emma causes problems for Monica and Chandlers love life. Guest starring Jon Lovitz

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross discovers who mugged him as a child and Chandlers internship gets off to an uninspiring start. Meanwhile, Joey endures a draining audition at the hands of a self-important actor. Guest starring Jeff Goldblum and Tenacious Ds Kyle Gass

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Boob Job
programme.desc: Cash-strapped couple Chandler and Monica conceal from each other that they have asked Joey for money. Rachel goes overboard in a bid to make her home baby-friendly, while Phoebe asks Mike to move in with her, but has second thoughts once it becomes clear he does not share her enthusiasm for marriage

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Memorial Service
programme.desc: A joke entry on Rosss college website backfires on Chandler. Joey refuses to give Emma his favourite stuffed toy, and weak-willed Phoebe begs Monica to help her avoid contacting Mike. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Everyone except Ross pools their money to buy lottery tickets, but a disagreement about how to spend any winnings prompts a disdainful Phoebe to make a rash gesture. Chandler frets as he waits for a phone call that could mean a new job, and Rachel thinks Emma is close to saying her first word

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel joins Joey on the set of his soap opera, where a steamy love scene inspires unexpected feelings - and a disturbing dream. Phoebe takes an opportunity to serenade a captive audience, while Chandler plans to whisk Monica away - but ends up inviting Ross. Jennifer Aniston and Matt LeBlanc star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Soap Opera Party
programme.desc: Joey throws a party for the cast of Days of Our Lives, but refuses to invite his pals in case their behaviour embarrasses him. However, the answering machine gives the game away and everyone attends - which is good news for Ross

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Fertility Test
programme.desc: Chandler and Monica go to a fertility clinic for tests, but are embarrassed to encounter an old acquaintance. Ross helps Joey pretend to be intelligent to woo Charlie, even though he is attracted to her himself, and Rachel sneaks into a spa for a massage

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Beaver, Pennsylvania, where he meets a brother-and-sister team who find it almost impossible to work together. Their relationship is so fractured that theyre failing to save their fathers Italian restaurant Levantis from being overwhelmed by local competition, and the situation has become so desperate that their dad is in danger of losing his life savings

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sams Mediterranean Kabob Room in Monrovia, California, and within minutes of his arrival, is caught in the crossfire of an argument between the owner, his wife and their children, all of whom are feeling the pressure of working seven days a week. Can the chef save the business and mend the warring familys frayed relationships?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the coastal community of Long Beach, California, to save an Italian restaurant that was opened in 1958 and now under the misguided leadership of Nino, who blamed by brother Michael and sister Carina for the eaterys failings. Their 78-year-old mother Inge desperate for Nino to turn the business around, but the feuding family members will have to solve their differences first

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordons disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. As the series reaches its halfway point, the Taskmaster is starting to know what to expect from his current crop of comics. But even hes surprised by the outrage Armando Iannucci causes with an ostrich, how Amy Gledhill struggles to remember the word for tube, and what Kumail Nanjiani does to time itself. Meanwhile, Joel Dommett has hours of fun with pots and pans, and Joanna Page and Alex Horne have an intimate conversation about guinea pigs while they wait for Armando to come and join them

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the game show mash-up, with Rachel Riley and Susie Dent. Jon Richardson and Sara Pascoe take on Sean Lock and Richard Ayoade. Nick Helm joins Susie in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Bill Baileys Remarkable Guide to the Orchestra
programme.desc: The comedian joins forces with Oscar-winning composer Anne Dudley to investigate some of the finer nuances of orchestral performance. He teams up with the BBC Concert Orchestra to reveal the lesser-known influences of some of the worlds most celebrated composers, and exhibits some of his own original works

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: The Quinns excitedly prepare for the annual trip to Barrys amusement park in Portrush. Surely an unfeasible amount of sandwiches and a massive surfboard is all they could need? Well, that and everyone making the train

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Jamess driving skills are put to the test as the gang set off with a van full of hooch and high hopes to an adult-free house in Donegal. Meanwhile, the Quinns visit local psychic Carlos Santini in the hope of making contact with a much-loved family spirit. Conleth Hill guest stars

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Sketch impeaches Lewyss presidential inking, Alice sheds some light on Rayas tasteless tunnel tatt, and Pash declares war on Rihannas disastrous declaration

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson are joined by guests Jack Dee, Steve Jones, David ODoherty and Jamelia to answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today. Jimmy Carr hosts the topical panel show

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: The Quinns excitedly prepare for the annual trip to Barrys amusement park in Portrush. Surely an unfeasible amount of sandwiches and a massive surfboard is all they could need? Well, that and everyone making the train

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: The CEO of Ritas Italian Ice and Frozen Custard joins the lower ranks of her business to see how her new initiatives are working and to help franchisees become more profitable

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Andrew Simon, president and CEO of Fremont Street Experience, who began his job at this hugely popular Las Vegas attraction at the start of the pandemic, goes undercover to discover and address problems that may be sparking the labour shortage causing significant lost profits

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In the fifth season, more couples put their homes in the bros hands. Can Jonathan and Drew raise the roof off of dilapidated, draughty and dingy digs? Michelle and Robs starter home was perfect a decade ago. But it has one of the weirdest layouts the brothers have ever seen. The floorplans confused and the interiors are kid-centric. Can Jonathan and Drew flip this upside-down house the right way round?Short: Michelle and Rob live in a house with one of the weirdest layouts the brothers have ever seen. Can Jonathan and Drew flip this upside-down house the right way round?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three dinner parties in West Yorkshire, including one held by glamorous couple Katie and Neil, who kick the competition off with a meal almost as beautifully presented as they are

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bedfordshire, Tom and his wife Naomi kick things off with an upmarket menu, which fails to leave an impression. On day two Victoria and her boyfriend Elliot cook up a massive Caribbean feast featuring a controversial goat curry. On the final night magician Neil and his fiance Charlie plan to wow their guests with a mysterious menu and magical entertainment

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A couple who have been engaged for seven years seek help in securing the funds necessary for them to tie the knot. They are given £12,000, on the condition that groom-to-be Sean is left to organise the wedding alone, but his scatter-brained attitude to planning raises concerns that members of his family might have to lend a hand at the last minute

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A music-loving groom-to-be is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials alone, but struggles to remember it is a wedding he is organising, not a concert, and battles his own ego to ensure his fiancee gets the day of her dreams

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Andy Wirth - the CEO of a California ski resort - goes undercover to learn more about his companys working practices as he prepares to merge an existing operation with a new acquisition

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Andy Wiederhorn, CEO of Los Angeles-based fast food restaurant Fatburger, goes incognito among his employees in order to learn more about his business that has evolved from a late-night hangout for musicians in the 1950s to an international success story

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Wilkinsburg in Pennsylvania, home to Ms Jeans Southern Cuisine, which was opened by retired special-education teacher Jean Gould. During the chefs attempt to save the business from disaster, he discovers her soul-food restaurant resembles a dentists waiting room and finds a lot of tension between Jean and her employees, who claim she is a Jekyll-and-Hyde character

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bobs in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. Every year profits nosedive through the bleak winter months, and matters arent improved when it becomes clear they have both lost their passion - not only for the business but also for each other. With the restaurant and marriage on the line, Gordon tries to help turn things around before its too late

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In the fifth season, more couples put their homes in the bros hands. Can Jonathan and Drew raise the roof off of dilapidated, draughty and dingy digs? Siblings Jessica and Jason have lived together for 16 years. But since Jessica met Taylor and started a family, its become a bit of a squeeze. And while Jonathan takes on a budget-friendly reno, Drew cant figure out if Jessica and Taylorare looking for one house, or two?Short:Siblings Jessica and Jason have lived together for 16 years. But since Jessica met Taylor and started a family, its become a squeeze. But are the couple looking for one house, or two?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fun-loving Karen and Irena kick-off the competition in Nottingham with a menu of comfort food. On day two, Lee and Maemae cook up an Indonesian menu with a British twist. Finally, its Clayton and Ninas turn to up the ante with an evening of French fine dining

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge astonishes Homer and the kids by landing the role of Blanche DuBois in an amateur production of A Streetcar Named Desire - and her performance is boosted by her frustration with Homer. With the guest voice of Jon Lovitz

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Mook, the Chef, the Wife and Her Homer
programme.desc: Homer volunteers to take Fat Tonys place as the head of the local Mafia, dragging the rest of the Simpson family into Springfields criminal underworld. With the guest voices of metal band Metallica and Sopranos stars Joe Pantoliano and Michael Imperioli

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe becomes a successful poet with Lisas help, and wins the approval of a group of highbrow authors - but enjoys the limelight so much that he claims all the credit for himself, prompting her to seek revenge

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart becomes Nelsons best friend and revels in the protection his new status brings. Unfortunately, the situation means he is unable to see Milhouse - forcing the pair to meet in secret. Meanwhile, Homer becomes addicted to one of Lisas fantasy books

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mystery and intrigue comes to Springfield as a British secret agent arrives in search of a spy. With the voice of Stephen Fry

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe breaks the most sacred rule of a secret society of bartenders, who seek the ultimate vengeance on Homer and his friends

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: The top five teams join the circus in Cambodias second-largest city, Siem Reap. Bicycles prove harder to ride than anticipated, before a fiddly final challenge to craft silk from lotus flowers brings mud, sweat and tears. Also, one team melt down as they face an arduous extra task that jeopardises their place in the final four

programme.title: Titanic (1997)
programme.desc: A party of explorers studying the sunken remains of the famous liner meets an elderly woman who was a passenger on the ill-fated maiden voyage. She recounts how she boarded the ship while on the brink of being forced into marriage by her family, and was stopped from killing herself by a penniless artist. She fell in love with her saviour, but the disaster on the horizon meant their time together was doomed to be short. James Camerons Oscar-winning romantic drama, starring Kate Winslet, Leonardo DiCaprio, Billy Zane, Kathy Bates and Bill Paxton

programme.title: Copshop (2021)
programme.desc: On the run from an assassin, a wily con artist devises a scheme to hide out inside a small-town police station. However, when the hitman turns up at the precinct, an unsuspecting rookie cop finds herself caught in the crosshairs. Thriller, starring Gerard Butler and Frank Grillo

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After nearly three months, the rollercoasters almost coming to an end. But not before one last dose of up-and-down mayhem. programme.desc: Groom-to-be Kain plans a gangster-themed wedding, but his fiancee Charlie has always dreamed of having a wedding day fit for a princess

The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the conclusion of Gordon Ramsays visit to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, he confronts sisters Rita and Lisa with an ultimatum, and finds himself stuck in a war between the waiters, chefs and owners over who is to blame for the Italian restaurants failings

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples have met their alternate matches, but now its time for the real drama - getting them to watch videos of how their spouses behaved

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The final dinner party arrives and its a time for celebration and consternation in equal measure. While some of the couples are stronger than ever following the test of meeting their alternate matches, others are left picking up the pieces after a tumultuous week. For one pair, its all too much - their marriage ends tonight

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge astonishes Homer and the kids by landing the role of Blanche DuBois in an amateur production of A Streetcar Named Desire - and her performance is boosted by her frustration with Homer. With the guest voice of Jon Lovitz

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Mook, the Chef, the Wife and Her Homer
programme.desc: Homer volunteers to take Fat Tonys place as the head of the local Mafia, dragging the rest of the Simpson family into Springfields criminal underworld. With the guest voices of metal band Metallica and Sopranos stars Joe Pantoliano and Michael Imperioli

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe becomes a successful poet with Lisas help, and wins the approval of a group of highbrow authors - but enjoys the limelight so much that he claims all the credit for himself, prompting her to seek revenge

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart becomes Nelsons best friend and revels in the protection his new status brings. Unfortunately, the situation means he is unable to see Milhouse - forcing the pair to meet in secret. Meanwhile, Homer becomes addicted to one of Lisas fantasy books

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mystery and intrigue comes to Springfield as a British secret agent arrives in search of a spy. With the voice of Stephen Fry

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe breaks the most sacred rule of a secret society of bartenders, who seek the ultimate vengeance on Homer and his friends

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: The top five teams join the circus in Cambodias second-largest city, Siem Reap. Bicycles prove harder to ride than anticipated, before a fiddly final challenge to craft silk from lotus flowers brings mud, sweat and tears. Also, one team melt down as they face an arduous extra task that jeopardises their place in the final four

programme.title: Titanic (1997)
programme.desc: A party of explorers studying the sunken remains of the famous liner meets an elderly woman who was a passenger on the ill-fated maiden voyage. She recounts how she boarded the ship while on the brink of being forced into marriage by her family, and was stopped from killing herself by a penniless artist. She fell in love with her saviour, but the disaster on the horizon meant their time together was doomed to be short. James Camerons Oscar-winning romantic drama, starring Kate Winslet, Leonardo DiCaprio, Billy Zane, Kathy Bates and Bill Paxton

programme.title: Copshop (2021)
programme.desc: On the run from an assassin, a wily con artist devises a scheme to hide out inside a small-town police station. However, when the hitman turns up at the precinct, an unsuspecting rookie cop finds herself caught in the crosshairs. Thriller, starring Gerard Butler and Frank Grillo

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After nearly three months, the rollercoasters almost coming to an end. But not before one last dose of up-and-down mayhem. The remaining couples face Final Vows and the ultimate choice on whether theyre going to stay betrothed or throw the last quarter of a year of their lives into the bin

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes including Love Is Blind, Starstruck, Cheaters, Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted, Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad, Teen First Dates and Sophie Raworths Sunday Morning interview with Boris Johnson. Plus, an appraisal of the coverage of the coronavirus on BBC News. From February 2022

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Married couple Abbie and Charlie join host Anna Richardson and feature as the first picker pair as they search for another woman to join their relationship. Plus 41 year-old actor and glamour puss Chrissie from Leeds is hoping to find husband number four

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Kain plans a gangster-themed wedding, but his fiancee Charlie has always dreamed of having a wedding day fit for a princess

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The entire family heads to Florida to support Phil at his mothers funeral - although the bereaved estate agent struggles with his mums final wish, which is to find a new woman for his dad. Meanwhile, Gloria is arrested and ends up in court, giving Mitchell a chance to show off his finest defence techniques

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Everyone turns to Vicky for answers about who really caused the crash, and Diane prepares to break the news of her prognosis to her family. Things take a shocking turn at the allotment as tensions rise between Sienna and Cleo, and a resident faces a tough choice between their family and their career. Meanwhile, Warren and Jenson go head-to-head over Mercedes, and Ro overhears Stes conversation in The Hutch

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Things take a shocking turn at the allotment as tensions rise between Sienna and Cleo, Diane tries to enjoy every moment with her family, and a resident faces a tough choice between their family and their career

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren and Jenson go head to head over Mercedes, and Ro overhears Stes conversation in the Hutch. With a secret hanging over them, is a new friendship over before its begun?

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his two-part challenge at Mangia Mangia in Woodland Park, Colorado. In order to save the struggling Italian restaurant from disaster, he must persuade harassed owner Julie to co-operate with the head chef, and work his magic on a menu that relies heavily on a microwave

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam visits Dave Kim at university to celebrate Halloween and is surprised to learn he has reinvented himself, while Geoff is terrified of Beverly taking over baby-care duties

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly embraces her new life as a grandmother while trying to stay young at heart, and Adam gets a job while he waits to start at New York University

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The friends pitch in for a yard sale to help raise money for the school but problems arise when Manny comes across an old trunk containing a secret of Glorias. Phil finds himself in a bit of a pickle, feeling pressured to sell and buy something, while Alexs new boyfriend is subjected to Claires thorough interrogation. Will she approve of him or will it turn out that she preferred Dylan?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay cant believe his luck when he gets out of a shopping trip - until he receives a visit from ex-wife Dede, the last person he was expecting to see on his doorstep. Knowing how much trouble she can cause, he is keen to get rid of her as soon as possible - especially as she is yet to find out about Glorias pregnancy. Meanwhile, Phil and Claire need Mitchs legal help when Haley is arrested for under-age drinking. American comedy, starring Ed ONeill, with a guest appearance from Shelley Long

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The final dinner party arrives and its a time for celebration and consternation in equal measure. While some of the couples are stronger than ever following the test of meeting their alternate matches, others are left picking up the pieces after a tumultuous week. programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Featuring a variety of cats doing strange things, soldiers stuck in the sand and a dog balancing on a rope

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isnt treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations hes ever encountered

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The City of New York v Homer Simpson
programme.desc: Barney borrows Homers car and vanishes on a drunken binge. Weeks later, Homer gets a letter from New York saying the vehicle is illegally parked between the towers of the World Trade Centre. Although Homer hates the Big Apple - owing to an unfortunate incident from his youth - the family heads to there to try to get the car back

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: As Principal Skinner prepares to enjoy a ceremony celebrating his 20th year as head of Springfield Elementary, a stranger exposes him as a former street punk who stole his identity. Featuring the guest voice of Martin Sheen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire visit hospital, where they get an unexpected - and frightening - glimpse of the future, while Mitch, Cam and Sofia take Lily to a Vietnamese restaurant to introduce her to her Asian roots. Jay struggles to put his prejudices aside when he accompanies Manny on a tour of a prospective private school

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Cam try to sell the house they bought, but when the estate agents negotiations fall through, they are forced to woo a potential buyer and seal the deal themselves. Tensions bubble over at the Pritchetts when Javier drops by with his new girlfriend, with Gloria taking an immediate dislike to her exs latest flame - especially when the woman strikes up a bond with Manny

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

For one pair, its all too much - their marriage ends tonight

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Pink-jacket-rocking Taiwo is first into the restaurant, for a date with fellow content creator Hemah. Hemahs opening gambit is to tell Taiwo to choose her drink, and he spends the rest of the date trying to keep up. Enthusiastic adventure swimmer Lindsey is paired with Sicilian chef Stefano, while party-loving DJ Bear is matched with matched with keen-to-get-married nanny Hollie

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer rents a Western for the family to watch, but is disappointed when it turns out to be a musical, so the family reminds him of musical highlights from past episodes. Featuring the guest voice of George Harrison

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A sleazy carnival worker and his son lose their jobs thanks to Homer, and end up moving in with the Simpson family - whose home they proceed to take over and completely wreck. With the guest voice of Jim Varney

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Family and friends gather for Rex and Stes pre-wedding dinner, but a lovelorn Ro might put a stop to it. Elsewhere, Frankie wants to come clean to Caleb

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: The agents plan a big barbecue for the celebrities, Lucinda Light has high hopes for her seaside date, while Dr Tara provides Coleen Nolan with some naughty toys. Also, Professor Green and wingman James head off on a double date, leaving Lucinda, Gabby and David to party back at the villa

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Jack has a warning for Jazz when Inga reaches out to her. Chuggs and Zeynos romance comes at the expense of their friendships with Tristan and Jules. Also, Sam Vanderpump launches a campaign to raise awareness of organ donation

programme.title: Man v Food: Best Of
programme.desc: Adam is in Portland to sample an elegant lobster roll sandwich. Then, he is given an hour to eat his way through a seven-pound seafood bounty

programme.title: Man v Food: Best Of
programme.desc: Adam travels to Hawaii to learn an authentic family recipe for succulent Pipikaula beef ribs. Then, he takes on the daunting Eagles Deli Challenge

programme.title: Man v Food: Best Of
programme.desc: In Kansas City, Adam bites into smoky baby back ribs and competes in the Shut Up Juice Challenge. He must finish a pulled pork sandwich dripping with habanero BBQ sauce

programme.title: Man v Food: Best Of
programme.desc: Adam digs into a one-pound Reuben sandwich and the meaty King Torta. Then, he is challenged to consume five fat sandwiches in 45 minutes

programme.title: Man v Food: Best Of
programme.desc: Adam travels to North Carolina to try a 20-ounce bacon double-cheeseburger. Later, he is given one hour to finish off one of the spiciest burgers in Texas

programme.title: Man v Food: Best Of
programme.desc: Adam visits a joint in Oklahoma to try a juicy 22-ounce prime rib. Later, he must eat five burger patties topped with American cheese and tortilla chips

programme.title: Man v Food: Best Of
programme.desc: Adam is in Detroit to sample a grilled hot dog smothered in chilli and mustard. Later, he is challenged to eat five massive hot dogs with a huge side of fries

programme.title: Man v Food: Best Of
programme.desc: Adam shares his most overstuffed sandwich moments. He competes in Luckys Challenge: finish three massive sandwiches plus fries and coleslaw in one hour

programme.title: James Martin: Sweet
programme.desc: The chef introduces a number of tasty bread recipes, including chocolate and mandarin, and scones

programme.title: James Martin: Sweet
programme.desc: James demonstrates how to create the lightest, fluffiest and most delicious sponges, including American baked cheesecake and chocolate roulade

programme.title: James Martin: Sweet
programme.desc: The chef presents recipes for luxurious puddings, including poached pears with cinnamon and goats milk sauce, and sherry trifle with raspberries

programme.title: James Martin: Sweet
programme.desc: The celebrity chef introduces surprising delicacies made from ingredients that can be found in the local supermarket, including lemon meringue pie and toffee bananas

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its the semi-final, and the four remaining bakers must set to work on producing 24 exquisite choux buns. Prue Leith has set a complex technical for her first semi-final that leaves everyone stumped. And theres a meringue sculpture showstopper where the bakers mustnt crack under pressure. Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig present, while Paul Hollywood passes judgement alongside Prue

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig present the 2017 grand final, as the three remaining bakers compete to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith and take home the trophy. For the final three challenges, they must prepare a batch of loaves, followed by a biscuit bake, and climaxing with a delicate, multi-layered, high-end patisserie showstopper to decide the winner

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding welcome 12 contestants to the tent, where judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith oversee them in three challenges. The competition kicks off with Biscuit Week, and the bakers are challenged to make signature bakes that say something both about them and a place in the British Isles, before tackling one of Pauls childhood favourites in the Technical. Finally, the bakers are tasked to make a 3D biscuit portrait in their first Showstopper

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its week two and the remaining 11 bakers face cake week - kicking off with a crowd-pleasing signature challenge. Next, the bakers face Prue Leiths first technical, a complicated cake with a very unusual ingredient. Finally, an ambitious chocolate-collared showstopper turns up the heat in the tent. Who will rise to the various tasks - and who will melt under the pressure? Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding present, while series regular Paul Hollywood and Prue pass judgement before another baker leaves the contest

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers tackle bread week, including an ambitious showstopper that is the largest bread sculpture challenge ever set in the tent. Before the plucky contestants reach that stage they must first impress judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith with teatime fruity favourite signature bake, followed by a deceptively simple time-test of a technical with an international flavour. Only one can claim star baker, while one of the competitors will have to leave the tent for good

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its dessert week and judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood set three sticky challenges to test the remaining nine bakers. There is a meringue signature, a wobbly technical, and a complex chocolate showstopper. Which bakers will impress Prue and Paul enough to keep their place in the tent? Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig announce who will be staying and leaving at the end of the show

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Football
programme.desc: Adam is in West London to watch Chelsea FC. Matchday starts with a doorstep bread breakfast sarnie, before trying a posh scotch egg and a tasty kebab

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Football
programme.desc: Adam is in Birmingham for an Aston Villa home game. He tucks into an Indian mixed grill, tries an amazing mushroom ravioli and enjoys a pad Thai

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James joins up with fellow chef Lisa Goodwin-Allen to explore Whitby, in James home county of North Yorkshire. James pops into his favourite fish and chip shop before cooking tikka mackerel buns with fennel and apple salad for the crowds at Whitby bandstand. Lisa, meanwhile, pays a visit to Michelin-starred restaurant The Black Swan, to see how its huge kitchen garden provides almost all of the produce used in the kitchen

programme.title: Nigel Slaters Dish of the Day
programme.desc: The food writer turns the contents of his weekly shop into seven dishes - one for each day of the week - adding new flavours to everyday recipes and creating culinary magic in just one pan. He begins by showing how to make the most of an abundance of ingredients, whether a special offer at the shops or extra produce from the garden

programme.title: Nigel Slaters Dish of the Day
programme.desc: The food writer turns the contents of his weekly shop into seven meals, adding new flavours and creating culinary magic in just one pan. He demonstrates how to transform a few overlooked staple recipes into sensational dishes, including haddock chowder, crumbed lamb steak with buttered swede mash and fennel feta linguine

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is road-testing mini bar snacks on the managers before opening a boarding house, including hometown toffee, a mix of candy, chocolate and trail mix

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummonds grilling up a well-deserved tailgate lunch, featuring smokey salt and pepper drumsticks, and flame-grilled cheesy steak burgers

programme.title: Jamies Great Britain
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver arrives in the West Country, and decides to look beyond the usual fare of pasties, Cheddar and cider to find alternative dishes. In Bristol, he visits a traditional Jamaican chef, and joins radio DJ Jules Davis to sample her mothers Guyanese specialities. He also goes foraging for mushrooms, prepares an apple pepperpot pudding using Caribbean spices, and cooks a centuries-old recipe for Bath chaps - otherwise known as pigs cheeks

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.sub-title: Cook Like A Pro: Farm Stand
programme.desc: Ina loves taking food from farm-to-table. Her springtime feast includes rosemary rack of lamb with easy tzatziki and parmesan-roasted courgette

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina shares her seafood secrets and useful tips. She makes delicious Bay scallops ceviche, salmon and melting cherry tomatoes, as well as warm lobster rolls

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host a special festival-themed round of the culinary competition. The episode kicks off with a signature challenge in which the bakers must draw inspiration from celebrations across the world. Moving on to the technical round, the contestants find the makings of a classic deep-fried Italian dish lurking beneath the mysterious gingham cloths. Finally, the Showstopper puts the bakers precision and creativity to the test before judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith decide who will be crowned StarBaker

programme.title: Mary Berry Cooks
programme.desc: The food writer and Great British Bake Off judge is in her own kitchen to give step-by-step instructions for recipes for everyday meals and special occasions. She begins with advice on how to host a traditional tea party, sharing a clever trick for making sandwiches in advance and baking bite-sized scones for a cream tea, while her grand-daughters help her make orange butterfly cakes. Mary also visits a plantation in Cornwall to find out how tea is grown

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: In Northern Ireland, James and local boy Paul Rankin brave the Carrick-a-Rede rope bridge together, then James cooks a tasty fish dish with the dramatic coastline as his backdrop

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James samples the culinary delights of Northern Ireland with friend and fellow chef Paul Rankin, visiting a wasabi farm and a honey producer. James cooks overlooking the dramatic backdrop of Slieve Gullion - the highest point in Armagh - before the pair visit Lough Neagh

Finally, the Showstopper puts the bakers precision and creativity to the test before judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith decide who will be crowned StarBaker

programme.title: Mary Berry Cooks
programme.desc: The food writer and Great British Bake Off judge is in her own kitchen to give step-by-step instructions for recipes for everyday meals and special occasions. She begins with advice on how to host a traditional tea party, sharing a clever trick for making sandwiches in advance and baking bite-sized scones for a cream tea, while her grand-daughters help her make orange butterfly cakes. Mary also visits a plantation in Cornwall to find out how tea is grown

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Football
programme.desc: Adam is on the south coast to watch Brighton and Hove Albion. First up are incredible Mexican tacos, then a gourmet monkfish and triple cooked chips

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Football
programme.desc: Adam explores the matchday food culture surrounding Liverpool FC. He enjoys fan-favourite salt and pepper chicken, and a half pigs head roast lunch.
