programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son travelling to Japan, where they begin in the capital Tokyo. Together, the pair visit one of the countrys biggest and most bizarre shops, get a taste for the national sport of sumo and enjoy some karaoke before resting their heads in one of the citys unique capsule hotels. Brads fear of heights is tested by hanging on a bridge in the Arakawa Valley

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The boys driving skills are tested when they experience real-life Tokyo Drift and they meet one of Japans wackiest record-breakers. The duo go head-to-head trying to crack the most walnuts with their bottoms and Brad makes a bid for redemption by attempting a stomach-churning bungee jump. Barney decides his dad needs to learn how to be more zen

programme.title: Whos Doing the Dishes?
programme.desc: DJ and TV presenter Toby Anstis puts on a dinner party as he plays mystery host to four strangers, who have to try to work out his identity using cryptic clues. Hosted by Brian McFadden

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel schemes to get a handsome client to ask her out on a date, while Chandlers girlfriend is driven away by his jealousy. Guest starring Tate Donovan

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Joeys Dirty Day
programme.desc: Chandler visits a strip club and Rachel comes to regret asking Ross for a favour. Meanwhile, Charlton Heston discovers his co-star Joey in a compromising position on the first day of filming

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Rugby
programme.desc: Ross makes the mistake of agreeing to a game of rugby with Emilys tough English friends. Meanwhile, one of Chandlers old flames turns up out of the blue - and it seems it is not just a flying visit

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Fake Party
programme.desc: Rachel spoils Rosss plans of a romantic last evening with Emily before she returns to England by organising a farewell party and inviting everyone. Meanwhile Phoebes pregnancy causes her to abandon her vegetarian lifestyle as she craves meat. Comedy, guest starring Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Free Porn
programme.desc: Ross pours out his heart to Emily, but is unprepared for her reaction, while Phoebe receives surprising news about her pregnancy. Chandler and Joey get free adult films on their TV and try to make sure they do not disappear

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels New Dress
programme.desc: Rachels date is ruined when Joshuas parents return home earlier than expected and catch her parading round in a skimpy nightie - which she then has to pretend is a new dress. Starring Jennifer Aniston and Tate Donovan

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: In Cardiff, drama student Josiah, factory worker Daniel and support worker Tomas hope to win a date with make-up artist Chanel. All they have to do is find her the perfect outfit - limited only by time, budget and their own sense of style

programme.title: The Voice USA
programme.desc: The knockout rounds begin, as the coaches Kelly Clarkson, John Legend and Adam Levine continue to whittle down their teams. Hosted by Carson Daly

programme.title: Womens Six Nations Highlights
programme.desc: A round-up of the best of the action from the 2026 Womens Six Nations, featuring all the tries, big hits and key moments.

programme.title: Living with Lucy
programme.desc: Gemma Collins invites Lucy Kennedy to move in with her for a weekend and is put to work in The Only Way is Essex stars shop and made to clear out her wardrobe

programme.title: The Assembly
programme.desc: David Tennant takes part in the innovative interview show in which he is questioned by an audience of inquisitive individuals who are autistic, neurodivergent and/or learning disabled. Does he believe in God? How did it feel to lose his parents? Does he know how to vogue? From his skincare regime to his cancelled friend, no subject is out of bounds

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The host is joined by eight-time Oscar-nominee Glenn Close, who is joining the cast of Wake Up Dead Man: A Knives Out Mystery. Also on the sofa are Emmy-winning Swedish star Alexander Skarsgard, who is playing a biker in British love story Pillion, actress and national treasure Miriam Margolyes, discussing her anthology The Little Book of Miriam, and Bridgerton star Nicola Coughlan, who is taking to the National Theatre stage. Plus, Jessie J performs HAPPY from her album Dont Tease Me with a Good Time

programme.title: Chasing Famous
programme.desc: An intimate and unfiltered dive into one of Generation Zs most lucrative and sought after professions

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.sub-title: Paul Bernardo and Karla Homolka: The Schoolgirl Killers
programme.desc: Canadian couple Paul Bernardo and Karla Homolka appeared to epitomise loves young dream when they were married, but they were serial killers who raped and murdered three teenage girls - one of them Homolkas 15-year-old sister Tammy. This film delves into their backgrounds and talks to those who knew them in an effort to find out what turned them into killers, while detectives, journalists and criminal psychologists also offer an insight into their motives

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Between 1976 and 1979, the community of Isla Vista in California was terrorised by serial killer Thor Nis Christiansen, who was caught and sentenced to life imprisonment after a fifth intended victim escaped and identified him in a Hollywood bar. This programme examines Christiansens character through the first-hand accounts and testaments of the people who knew him best, while detectives, journalists and criminal psychologists also offer an insight into the motives that drove him to kill
